channel.title: The `theme` namespace
channel.description:
## Description Even tho we recommend theme developers to use the `theme` namespace, we don't have a
## User Stories > As a **theme developer** > I want to **know what properties I should add to the theme namespace** > so that **final users can configure them in their settings file**
> As a **theme developer** > I want to **know what properties I should add to the theme namespace** > so that **other packages can use them**
## Examples - The `wp-comments` could look for `state.theme.colors.primary` to do some styling that matches the theme.
## Possible solution - Some of the properties could be required, like a primary color. - Some of the properties could be optional.
This [theme specification](https://github.com/system-ui/theme-specification) it is interesting, even tho it is still a work-in-progress. It's used by [styled-system](https://styled-system.com/ecosystem/) ecosystem.
<!-- ------------------------------------------------------------------------ --> <!-- This will be filled by the Frontity team, please do not remove it --> <!-- ------------------------------------------------------------------------
## GitHub Issues - [Issue](####) -->

item.title: The `theme` namespace
item.dc:creator: luisherranz
item.description:
There is a proposal for a design system in Gutenberg. We should take a look at that too:

github.com/WordPress/gutenberg

🖍 A Block Style System

opened 01:10PM - 01 Sep 18 UTC
mtias

Previously #5360 I'd like to define some areas of work around theme styling that go beyond WordPress 5.0. During the last 37...

Customization [Type] Overview

Read full topic

item.title: The `theme` namespace
item.dc:creator: luisherranz
item.description:
Description

Even tho we recommend theme developers to use the theme namespace, we don’t have a

User Stories

As a theme developer
I want to know what properties I should add to the theme namespace
so that final users can configure them in their settings file

As a theme developer
I want to know what properties I should add to the theme namespace
so that other packages can use them

Examples

  • The wp-comments could look for state.theme.colors.primary to do some styling that matches the theme.

Possible solution

  • Some of the properties could be required, like a primary color.
  • Some of the properties could be optional.

This theme specification it is interesting, even tho it is still a work-in-progress. It’s used by styled-system ecosystem.

Read full topic
